calendar.matters:
Pet. For Order Invalidating Trust; Tr. Agreement, Will, And Grant Deed Property To Tr, Pet. To Compel To Rpt. And Acct. By Current Trustee; Ect.
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Of Probate Contest
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Pet. For Order Invalidating Trust; Tr. Agreement, Will, And Grant Deed Property To Tr, Pet. To Compel To Rpt. And Acct. By Current Trustee; Ect.
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Continued To Jun-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terence Mayo for Gina Conti, Petitioner; Edward Koplowitz for Ronald Massoni, Respondent.

Mr. Mayo reported that the case was settled and will put it in writing in the next 3 to 4 weeks. The Court continued the matter to June 23, 2008 for a Petition for approval of the settlement.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris

Pet. For Order Invalidating Trust; Tr. Agreement, Will, And Grant Deed Property To Tr, Pet. To Compel To Rpt. And Acct. By Current Trustee; Ect.
Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Continued To Apr-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz for Ron Massoni. Terence Mayo for Gina Conti (Petitioner).

Mr Koplowitz requested a continuance stating that there was good chance of the matter being resolved, and asked the Court to refer the matter to Pro Bono Mediation, to which Mr. Mayo agreed. The Court referred the matter to Pro Bono Mediation, (signing the order for the same in open court). Mediation must be completed no later than April 21, 2008. The matter was for April 28, 2008 for status on mediation.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue M .Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.
